vocabulary.example: The theory is an abstract of the real world.
vocabulary.example_translation: 這理論是世界上的抽象版

vocabulary.example: The car will accelerate to 100 km/h in 10 seconds.
vocabulary.example_translation: 這輛車在 10 秒內會加速到 100 公里/小時

vocabulary.example: The bridge spans across the river.
vocabulary.example_translation: 這座橋橫跨著河流

vocabulary.example: You should adjust the temperature in the room.
vocabulary.example_translation: 你應該調整房間的溫度

vocabulary.example: She faced a great adversity during the war.
vocabulary.example_translation: 她在戰爭期間經歷了極大的困境

vocabulary.example: He is an ambitious young man who wants to be a CEO.
vocabulary.example_translation: 他是一名雄心勃勃的年輕人，想成為CEO

vocabulary.example: We need to analyze the data to find the solution.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我們需要分析資料才能知道解決方案

vocabulary.example: I can anticipate the difficulties in the project.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我預先預料到該項目會遇到的困難

vocabulary.example: The main argument in the essay is the importance of education.
vocabulary.example_translation: 該文章的主要論點是教育的重要性

vocabulary.example: I assert that the theory is correct.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我斷言該理論是正確的

vocabulary.example: We assume that the customer will pay on time.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我們假設客戶會按時繳付

vocabulary.example: Please authenticate yourself before entering the building.
vocabulary.example_translation: 請在進入建築物之前驗證身份

vocabulary.example: The news report has a bias towards the government.
vocabulary.example_translation: 該新聞報導對政府存在偏見

vocabulary.example: You need to calculate the area of the room.
vocabulary.example_translation: 你需要計算房間的面積

vocabulary.example: The book is categorized as a fiction novel.
vocabulary.example_translation: 該書籍被分類為小說

vocabulary.example: We classify the customers based on their demographics.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我們根據客戶的人口統計數據進行分類

vocabulary.example: It's essential to communicate effectively with your team.
vocabulary.example_translation: 與你的團隊溝通是非常重要的

vocabulary.example: The two companies are competing for the market share.
vocabulary.example_translation: 兩間公司正競爭市場份額

vocabulary.example: I made a concession to my friend by buying her a gift.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我向我的朋友讓步了，買了一個禮物給她

vocabulary.example: She is confident in her ability to solve the problem.
vocabulary.example_translation: 她對解決問題的能力感到自信

vocabulary.example: Your writing style is consistent throughout the article.
vocabulary.example_translation: 你文章的寫作風格在整篇文章中始終一致

vocabulary.example: He is a considerate roommate and always cleans up after himself.
vocabulary.example_translation: 他是一個體貼的房友，總是擦乾淨自己

vocabulary.example: Understanding the context of the situation is crucial.
vocabulary.example_translation: 了解情況的背景非常重要

vocabulary.example: We need to cooperate with each other to achieve the goal.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我們需要合作來達成目標

vocabulary.example: The map corresponds to the real world.
vocabulary.example_translation: 這張地圖對應到了真正的世界

vocabulary.example: The critical moment in the story is when the hero makes a decision.
vocabulary.example_translation: 故事中的關鍵時刻是當英雄做出決定

vocabulary.example: The festival is a cultural event for the community.
vocabulary.example_translation: 該節日是社區的文化活動

vocabulary.example: I decline your invitation to the party.
vocabulary.example_translation: 我婉拒你的邀請

vocabulary.example: The new technology will demonstrate its benefits in the future.
vocabulary.example_translation: 新技術將在未來表明其優點

vocabulary.example: He became a deterrent to the crime organization.
vocabulary.example_translation: 他成了犯罪組織的威嚇

vocabulary.example: The math problem was difficult to solve.
vocabulary.example_translation: 數學問題頗為困難

vocabulary.example: The diplomatic efforts helped to resolve the conflict.
vocabulary.example_translation: 外交努力幫助解決了沖突
